title: Growing Nourishment
subtitle: Supporting increased energy needs
description: As you enter the second trimester, your energy levels may begin to improve. Your body’s nutritional needs also increase gradually, making it important to focus on fuller, more nourishing meals.
what_to_expect: Improved energy levels compared to earlier weeks
nutrition_focus: Increase portion sizes slightly if comfortable
Include more protein and nutrient-rich foods
Maintain a consistent and balanced meal routine
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, papaya, orange, and guava
Vegetables including spinach, beans, carrots, and लौकी
Protein sources like curd, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or irregular eating patterns
hydration: Drink water regularly throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or lemon water
reassurance: With improving energy, nourishing your body well can help you feel stronger and more balanced.

diabetes.personalized_description: Balanced and slightly increased nutrition supports stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
Avoid sudden increases in portion sizes
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Balanced increases in nutrition help maintain stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Increased nutritional intake can support better iron levels and energy.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Improved intake supports your strength and energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals with controlled salt intake support stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent and balanced meals support a calm routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: A consistent and nutrient-rich diet supports metabolic balance.
nutrition_focus: Include a balanced variety of nutrients
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency supports your body's natural balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, gradually increasing nutrition while maintaining balance is important.
priority_nutrition: Focus on balanced and nutrient-rich meals
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady and balanced nourishment supports your growing needs.
